summary: Iteration 80 backend testing completed successfully. All 17 tests passed (100%). Tested: 1) GET /api/company/settings returns new fields classe_esecuzione_default and certificato_en13241_numero, 2) PUT /api/company/settings saves these new fields correctly (EXC1-EXC4 values, certification numbers), 3) GET /api/fascicolo-tecnico/{commessa_id} returns auto-populated fields report_numero, report_data, ordine_numero, spessore in _auto_fields, plus mandatario and client_name.
test_credentials: Test users created/cleaned during pytest run
seed_data_creation: Test commesse, clients, material_batches with spessore values created during tests, cleaned up after
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 80 adds two new fields to company settings: classe_esecuzione_default (dropdown EXC1-EXC4) and certificato_en13241_numero (certification number for EN 13241). GET/PUT /api/company/settings handles these correctly. The GET /api/fascicolo-tecnico/{cid} endpoint returns auto-populated fields including report_numero, report_data, ordine_numero, and spessore in the _auto_fields array. The mandatario is auto-populated from the client business_name. Settings page has a 'Certificazioni' tab with EN 1090-1 section (including classe_esecuzione_default dropdown and certificato_en1090_numero) and EN 13241 section (certificato_en13241_numero). Also has 'Dati Ente Certificatore' card with responsabile_nome, ruolo_firmatario, ente_certificatore, ente_certificatore_numero fields.

company_settings_new_fields_response.details: GET /api/company/settings returns classe_esecuzione_default and certificato_en13241_numero fields

company_settings_save_both_fields.details: PUT /api/company/settings saves both new fields together with other certification fields

company_settings_persistence.details: GET /api/company/settings returns previously saved new fields (classe_esecuzione_default=EXC4, certificato_en13241_numero=PERSIST-TEST-001)

fascicolo_report_numero.details: GET /api/fascicolo-tecnico/{cid} returns report_numero in _auto_fields, auto-populated from commessa numero

fascicolo_report_data.details: GET /api/fascicolo-tecnico/{cid} returns report_data in _auto_fields, auto-populated with today's date (dd/mm/yyyy)

fascicolo_ordine_numero.details: GET /api/fascicolo-tecnico/{cid} returns ordine_numero in _auto_fields, auto-populated from commessa numero

fascicolo_spessore.details: GET /api/fascicolo-tecnico/{cid} returns spessore auto-populated from material_batches (8mm / 10mm)

fascicolo_all_auto_fields.details: _auto_fields list includes commessa_numero, report_data, data_emissione, ddt_data and other auto-populated fields

fascicolo_client_name.details: GET /api/fascicolo-tecnico/{cid} returns client_name in _auto_fields from client business_name

fascicolo_mandatario.details: GET /api/fascicolo-tecnico/{cid} returns mandatario in _auto_fields, auto-populated from client business_name
